message:
test(suggest): add unit tests for suggest.rs

Add 15 unit tests covering:

Argument parsing (12 tests):
- Default values for all options
- --cwd, --budget, --ignore-cooldowns, --reset-cooldowns
- --no-bandit, --bandit-exploration, --reset-bandit
- Combined options
- Invalid budget and exploration values

Path functions (3 tests):
- cooldown_path returns expected path
- bandit_path returns expected path
- Both paths share same parent directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
